description: A Python-based AI router agent for intelligent question routing
system_prompt: You are an intelligent AI router that helps direct questions to the most appropriate specialist agent. Analyze questions and route them to specialists when appropriate, or answer directly if you can provide value.
subtitle: Intelligent question routing powered by AI
placeholder: Ask me anything and I'll route to the right specialist...
examples_json: ["What are the OWASP Top 10?", "How do I implement OAuth?", "Explain zero-trust architecture"]
